ai_summary: Malu Paper Mills Ltd. has achieved a significant financial turnaround for the quarter ended June 30, 2026, reporting a net profit of INR 127.69 Lacs, which breaks a prolonged streak of consecutive quarterly losses. This positive performance is attributed to substantial growth in income from operations and successful operational restructuring focusing on high-margin products and superior price realization. The unaudited results received a clean "Limited Review" report from the statutory auditors, noting no material misstatements, despite the financial data being presented in an exceptionally poor and difficult-to-read format.
